text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You're an expert at everything, Maya.

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
Since you're so smart, I figured you could help me
with my relationship problems too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... It's true that I am a mature, grown-up
woman, but I think relationships are... a bit much
for me right now.

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to think that hard about it! Just
think of it like a race.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...So when the time comes, you have to take the
initiative! No holding back!

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text: Oh, I think I see what you mean!

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly the push I needed! Thanks,
Maya. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
No problem! Races, love—I can handle
anything! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to a flash of inspiration, Mayano Top Gun
has succeeded at giving relationship advice.

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
So you don't have to think that hard about it! Just
put yourself in the shoes of the person you're
interested in, right?

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text: Is there someone you're interested in, Maya?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
W-well... I guess so, but... being so grown-up and
supporting me all the time, I dunno if I—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: This is too much! I can't do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun ends up learning the
fundamentals of relationships from her friend.
